title: Touring is Hard for Small Bands, but Harry Styles is Helping
summary: Brown Horse is a band from Norwich, England. They love making music and playing shows. But touring is very expensive. They sell T-shirts to make extra money. Sometimes they sleep on friends' floors or drive a very old van to save money. Many small bands have the same problem. Now, famous singers like Harry Styles are helping. They add a small fee to their concert tickets. This money goes to a charity that helps small bands. Brown Horse got some of this money. They will use it to pay for hotels and to pay themselves for the first time in a year. They are very thankful. This help makes touring a little easier for them.

background_read: Many small bands struggle to afford touring because of high costs like gas, food, and places to sleep. Famous musicians sometimes create funds to help these bands.
Article_Structure: WHO: Brown Horse, a small band from Norwich, and famous singers like Harry Styles.
WHAT: Touring is expensive for small bands, but a charity fund from ticket fees is helping them.
WHERE: In the UK, especially at concerts and on tour.
WHY: To help small bands afford touring and keep making music.

perspectives.description: Touring is a constant struggle, but they are grateful for the help.
The fund helps support the music scene by giving money to small bands.
